name: Vinod -The Legend
overview: Slayy Point and Slayy Pop are  Indian YouTube channels co-founded by creators Abhyudaya Mohan and Gautami Kawale. Known for light-hearted, millennial-friendly content on topics like social media and daily life, the duo has built a massive following with their humorous commentary.

trailers.title: Honest Baaghi 3 Trailer Review by SlayyPop
